meta.description: AI adoption data by country. Adoption rates primarily from Microsoft AI Diffusion Report (H2 2025). Population from UN World Population Prospects.

sources.name: CNNIC 57th Statistical Report on China's Internet (Dec 2025)
Deloitte Gen AI in Asia Pacific
Korea Herald: S.Korea Paid ChatGPT Users
Rest of World: Gen AI Adoption

countries.name: UAE
countries.highlight: #1 globally in gen AI adoption rate at 64%
countries.detail: Early government investment in digital infrastructure and AI skilling pays off

countries.name: Singapore
countries.highlight: #2 globally; highest AI talent concentration per capita
countries.detail: 1.64% of workforce in AI roles — 2.45x the global average

countries.name: France
countries.highlight: European AI leader, home to Mistral AI
countries.detail: 48% of financial sector already using AI tools

countries.name: China
countries.highlight: 602M gen AI users via domestic platforms (ChatGPT is banned)
countries.detail: #1 globally in AI publications (23,695) and patents (35,423) in 2024

countries.name: United Kingdom
countries.highlight: Ranked #9 globally — 4th in ChatGPT traffic share
countries.detail: Strong AI research base with hubs in London, Cambridge, and Oxford

countries.name: Australia
countries.highlight: High adoption driven by strong digital infrastructure
countries.detail: 49% adoption rate measured in Salesforce knowledge worker surveys

countries.name: Canada
countries.highlight: Outpaces the US in adoption rate — birthplace of modern deep learning
countries.detail: 53% of the financial sector already using AI

countries.name: Malaysia
countries.highlight: 79% of frontline workers integrating AI into their roles
countries.detail: 68% AI optimism rate — 16 points above the global average

countries.name: Germany
countries.highlight: Ranked #21 globally — 43,000 AI specialists and growing
countries.detail: 46% financial sector AI adoption; strong industrial AI applications

countries.name: South Korea
countries.highlight: #2 globally in paid ChatGPT subscribers, behind only the US
countries.detail: 80% growth in adoption rate since Oct 2024 — vs 35% global average

countries.name: United States
countries.highlight: Only 28% adoption but #1 in AI investment ($109B) and model creation
countries.detail: ~60% of top AI experts worldwide; 40 notable AI models produced in 2024

countries.name: Indonesia
countries.highlight: 92% of knowledge workers report using AI, but infrastructure limits scale
countries.detail: High download volumes but lower sustained adoption due to connectivity gaps

countries.name: Japan
countries.highlight: 5th in ChatGPT traffic but lowest daily usage rate (6%) among surveyed nations
countries.detail: Only 1.9% enterprise AI adoption in core functions vs 6.1% in the US

countries.name: India
countries.highlight: 100M weekly ChatGPT users — #2 in traffic — but only 15.7% population adoption
countries.detail: 36% use ChatGPT daily (highest globally); 252% growth in AI talent since 2016

countries.name: Brazil
countries.highlight: #3 globally in ChatGPT traffic despite only ~17% population adoption

countries.name: Nigeria
countries.highlight: Fastest growth trajectory in Africa — rising from under 3% to 9.3% in two years
countries.detail: Only ~60% have electricity access; Africa's first OpenAI Academy at Univ. of Lagos
